blocks.label: Simple Definition
blocks.text: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the ability of a computer or machine to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.

blocks.label: Technical Definition
blocks.text: AI is a branch of Computer Science that develops intelligent systems capable of learning, reasoning, problem-solving, decision-making, and understanding data.

blocks.heading: Why do we need AI? Because humans cannot always:
items: Process huge amounts of data quickly
Make instant decisions in every situation
blocks.note: AI helps automate these tasks efficiently.

blocks.heading: Real-Life Examples
items: Google Maps → Finds the best route

items.label: AI Program
items.text: Learns from data, improves over time. Example: ChatGPT.

blocks.heading: Key Points
items: AI can learn, reason, and make decisions.
AI is used in almost every industry today.

interviewQA.question: What is Artificial Intelligence?
interviewQA.answer: AI is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.

examQuestions.question: Explain Artificial Intelligence with suitable examples.
